nasb.text: “And you, son of man, prophesy against Gog and say, ‘Thus says the Lord God, “Behold, I am against you, O Gog, prince of Rosh, Meshech and Tubal;

esv.text: “And you, son of man, prophesy against Gog and say, Thus says the Lord God: Behold, I am against you, O Gog, chief prince of Meshech and Tubal.

cnv.text: “人子啊！你要向歌革說預言：‘主耶和華這樣說：羅施、米設和土巴的首領歌革啊！我要與你為敵。

ccb.text: “人子啊，你要发预言斥责歌革，告诉他，主耶和华这样说，‘米设和土巴的首领歌革啊，我要与你为敌。
